title: sandbox-strategy-designer inputs
description: Typed inputs for the sandbox-strategy-designer runtime agent. Machine-readable mirror of the Inputs table in AGENT.md. The harness validates caller-supplied input packets against this schema before the agent begins work; validation failures surface the offending field to the caller rather than failing mid-run.

target_org_alias.description: Example from AGENT.md: `prod` Required column: 'yes for audit (prod)'.

team_size.description: Example from AGENT.md: `{ "developers": 12, "admins": 5, "qa": 4 }` Required column: 'yes for design'.

concurrent_workstreams.description: Example from AGENT.md: `["core","integrations","agentforce"]` Required column: 'yes for design'.

release_cadence.description: Example from AGENT.md: `biweekly` | `monthly` | `quarterly` Required column: 'yes for design'.

data_sensitivity.description: Example from AGENT.md: `["pii","phi","pci","none"]` Required column: 'yes for design'.
